description:
Configure the email receipt settings for 'City Lights Bookstore' in Copper Point of Sale using the following SMTP configuration:
- SMTP Host: smtp.sendgrid.net
- Port: 587
- Secure Connection: Yes (SSL/TLS/STARTTLS)
- Authentication: Enabled
- Username: apikey
- Password: SG.RetailAgent.Verify123!
- Sender Email: receipts@citylightsbooks.com
- Reply-To Email: manager@citylightsbooks.com

Set the email subject template to 'Your City Lights Bookstore Receipt'.
